drive_hint: Pick the drive or card you want to recover from
drive_warning: ⚠️ Important: do not save anything new onto the affected drive until recovery is done
auto_refresh: 🔄 List refreshes automatically when you plug in a card
types_hint: Choose the kinds of files to recover
dest_question: Where should recovered files be saved?
dest_hint: Choose a folder on a different drive than the affected one
dest_same_drive: ⛔ Cannot save onto the affected drive — pick another drive
scan_hint: AlMunqith is examining every byte — keep this window open
ev_read_timeout: Drive stopped responding — trying to revive it...
ev_gap_recorded: Skipped and logged a bad region
results_title: Scan complete — here is what I found
results_hint: Click files to select them, then press Recover
